PredictiveSearchProduct.description:
Search API Types
Based on Shopify Storefront API documentation
https://shopify.dev/docs/api/storefront/latest/queries/predictiveSearch
https://shopify.dev/docs/api/storefront/latest/queries/products

EnrichedProduct.description: Product with enriched rating data (matches homescreen format)

CollectionWithProducts.description: Collection with products (matches homescreen categoryCollectionGrid format)

InitialSearchScreenResponse.description:
Response for GET /customer/search/initial-screen
Returns trending products and collections for the search screen

EnrichedSearchItem.description: Enriched search item - can be either a product or collection with complete Shopify data

EnrichedTrendingSearch.description: Enriched trending search - similar to EnrichedSearchItem but with trending metrics

SearchContextResponse.description:
Response for GET /customer/search/context
Returns personalized search context including recent searches, trending searches, and trending products

RecommendedProduct.description: Simplified product object for API responses

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

error.description: Error message if success is false

sourceProductId.description: The Shopify product ID that recommendations are based on

recommendedProducts.description: Array of recommended products with full product details

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

error.description: Error message if success is false

cartItemsCount.description: Number of items in the cart that recommendations are based on

recommendedProducts.description: Array of recommended products with full product details

cartItems.description: Array of Shopify product IDs currently in the cart

StoredPaymentMethod.description: Stored payment method object (sanitized from Stripe)

GetDefaultStoredPaymentMethodResponse.description: Get default stored payment method response

FavoritesResponse.description: Favorites response - returns just product IDs for efficient client-side merging

Record_string.any_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

DetailedFavoritesResponse.description: Detailed favorites response with full product data and pagination

fullName.description: Alternative field name for full name

phoneNumber.description: Alternative field name for phone number

deviceToken.description: Push notification token (alternative name for mobile compatibility)

CustomerAddAddressRequest.description: Customer Address interface for request body

ShippingRate.description:
Checkout API Types

TypeScript interfaces for checkout flow requests and responses
Ensures type safety across checkout controllers and services

SaveStep2Request.description: Request to save Step 2 (payment method) data

CheckoutRequiresActionResponse.description: Response when checkout requires additional action (3D Secure)

CompleteCheckoutRequest.description: Request to complete checkout and process payment

CartItemInput.description: Cart item input for adding to cart

AddItemsRequest.description: Add items to cart request body

Record_string.string_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

Record_string.boolean_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

UpdateProfileRequest.description:
Update profile request - accepts any key/value pairs
Restricted fields cannot be updated

info.title: Cartaisy API
info.description: E-commerce backend API with Shopify integration

get.description:
Predictive Search - Autocomplete/Suggestions
Fast search for autocomplete dropdown (< 100ms typical response time)

parameters.description: - Number of results per type (default: 10, max: 10 per Shopify)
parameters.name: limit

get.description:
Full Product Search - Search Results Page
Comprehensive search with pagination, filtering, and sorting

Shopify search query syntax:
- "laptop" - Simple keyword
- "title:laptop" - Search in title only
- "tag:electronics" - Filter by tag
- "vendor:Apple" - Filter by vendor
- "product_type:Computers" - Filter by product type
- "available:true" - Only available products

post.description:
Track Product Click
Track when user clicks on a search result

get.description:
Get Popular Searches
Returns most frequently searched terms

Get User's Recent Searches
Returns authenticated user's recent search history

post.description:
Clear User's Search History
Deletes authenticated user's search history

get.description:
Get Initial Search Screen Data
Returns trending products and collections for the search screen with complete data including images, ratings, and enriched product information.
Products and collections match the homescreen data format for UI component reuse.

parameters.description: - Timeframe in days for trending calculation (default: 7)
parameters.name: timeframe

get.description:
Get Search Context Data
Returns personalized search context with enriched product/collection data for recent and trending searches.
Authentication is optional - recent searches only included for authenticated users.

parameters.description: - Number of items to return per category (default: 5, max 5)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: - Timeframe in days for trending calculation (default: 7)
parameters.name: timeframe

get.description:
Main Product & Collection Search
Comprehensive search with filters, pagination, and sorting.
Returns both products and collections for better discovery.

parameters.description: - Sort order (relevance, price_low, price_high, rating, popular, newest)
parameters.name: sortBy

get.description:
Get Search Suggestions
Fast autocomplete suggestions from search history and products

Get Popular Searches
Returns most frequently searched terms

Get Trending Searches
Returns searches with highest growth rate

Get Failed Searches
Returns searches that returned no results (admin analytics)

post.description:
Track Search Click
Track when user clicks on a search result

get.description:
Get User Search History
Returns authenticated user's recent search history

post.description:
Clear User Search History
Deletes authenticated user's search history

get.description:
Get Search Analytics
Comprehensive search analytics including volume, trends, device stats

Get Trending Collections
Returns most viewed collections in given timeframe

post.description:
Track Collection View
Track when user views a collection page

Log Search
Explicitly log a search from the mobile app to populate recent searches.
Call this when user performs a search and views results.

200.description: Product recommendations with full product data

get.description:
Get product recommendations for Product Detail Page (PDP)

Returns recommended products based on a specific Shopify product ID.
Uses Shopify's native recommendations algorithm with smart fallback to
category and tag-based matching when Shopify API is unavailable.

parameters.description: - Number of recommendations to return (default: 6, max: 50)
parameters.name: limit

200.description: Cart recommendations with full product data

post.description:
Get cart-based recommendations

Returns recommended products based on items currently in the shopping cart.
Aggregates recommendations from multiple cart items and ranks them by frequency
to show products that complement the entire cart contents.

parameters.description: - Number of recommendations to return (default: 6, max: 50)
parameters.name: limit

get.description:
Get complete homescreen data for the mobile app
Returns all components needed to render the mobile app home screen including
carousel, category grid, banners, collection displays, and layout configuration.

parameters.description: Alternative: Store ID from query parameter

Get products from a collection with pagination, filtering, and sorting

post.description:
Initialize checkout session from cart

Creates a checkout session linked to the user's Shopify cart
Session expires in 30 minutes

get.description:
Get available shipping rates for an address

Uses Shopify Storefront API to get real-time shipping rates

404.description: Session or payment method not found

post.description:
Apply promo code

Uses Shopify Storefront API to validate and apply discount codes

delete.description:
Remove promo code

Removes the applied promo code from the checkout session

get.description:
Get checkout summary

Returns complete checkout details for review before payment

500.description: Internal Server Error - Payment or order creation failed

post.description:
Complete checkout and process payment

Final step: Creates payment intent, processes payment, creates order in Shopify

Flow:
1. Validate session and all required data
2. Create Stripe payment intent
3. Confirm payment
4. On success: Create draft order in Shopify
5. Complete draft order
6. Save order in database
7. Mark session as completed
